data.name: Control_ButtonDesc
data.value: A control that responds to user input.

data.name: Control_CheckBoxDesc
data.value: A control that a user can select or clear.

data.name: Control_DropDownButtonDesc
data.value: A button that display a flyout of choices when clicked.

data.name: Control_SliderDesc
data.value: Lets the user select from a range of values.

data.name: Control_ToggleButtonDesc
data.value: A button switchable between two states.

data.name: Control_ToggleSwitchDesc
data.value: A switch that can be toggled between 2 states.

data.name: GettingStartedContent
data.value: An overview of app development options and samples.

data.name: GitHubRepoContent
data.value: The latest fluent design controls and styles for your applications.

data.name: CodeSamplesContent
data.value: Find samples that demonstrate specific tasks, features and APIs.

data.name: VP_SoundDescription
data.value: Volume levels, output, input, sound devices

data.name: VP_AppsSettingsDescription
data.value: Apps might have their own settings

data.name: VP_ChooseDevice
data.value: Choose a device for speaking or recording

data.name: DP_OptimisticContent
data.value: As long as you stay optimistic, you will find countless joys in this world!

data.name: DP_URLWatermark
data.value: Enter file, stream or playlist URL

data.name: DP_EyeQuote
data.value: One eye to forget you, the other to remember you.

data.name: DP_ForgeDesc
data.value: Forge (Minecraft Forge) is an open-source mod loader for Minecraft Java Edition, providing developers with a standard API for compatible mods.

data.name: DP_TeachingTipSubtitle
data.value: The shortest shortcut is to take the detour, and taking the detour is my shortest shortcut.

data.name: DP_ThisIsDialogWithMask
data.value: This is a dialog with mask

data.name: VP_SystemReqDes
data.value: This product is available for your device. Items with a check mark meet the developer's system requirements.

data.name: Custom_Title_Bar_Content
data.value: This is a Custom message bar. You can customize the content of the message bar.

data.name: Error_Title_Bar_Content
data.value: This is an Error message bar

data.name: Information_Title_Bar_Content
data.value: This is an Information message bar

data.name: Success_Title_Bar_Content
data.value: This is a Success message bar
